Name: Jasper WHM Events
Description: Damage-forward White Mage event profile for general PvE. Lets ACR DPS flow, keeps combat toggles healthy, then uses earlier Regen/Benison upkeep, oGCD-first tank recovery, dungeon-pull shielding, in-range Holy for stacked packs, and emergency GCD heals only when recovery is actually needed. Based on Arche's general reaction profile foundation, with Jasper modifications for public-duty safety and xSalice compatibility.

Events.Name: [01] Temperance
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide and don't have plenary

Events.Name: [02] Divine Caress
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide AND Temperance active

Events.Name: [03] Plenary Indulgence
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide AND don't have divine caress or temperance

Events.Name: [04] Liturgy of the Bell
Events.Description: Party hp average <= 60% HP

Events.Name: [05] Liturgy of the Bell (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide if off cooldown and party avg hp <= 80%

Events.Name: [06] Divine Benison (TB)
Events.Description: Tank before Tankbuster & no aqua on them

Events.Name: [07] Divine Benison (Aggro)
Events.Description: Tank if >= 3 aggro

Events.Name: [08] Divine Benison (AoE)
Events.Description: Self or party member before AoE/Raidwide if HP < 70%

Events.Name: [09] Divine Benison (2 Charges)
Events.Description: Use on tank at 90% HP if in combat and 2 charges are available.

Events.Name: [10] Aquaveil (TB)
Events.Description: Tank before Tankbuster and no divine benison on them

Events.Name: [11] Aquaveil (Aggro)
Events.Description: Tank if >= 3 aggro

Events.Name: [12] Asylum
Events.Description: Place center if party average hp <= 80%

Events.Name: [13] Tetragrammaton (MT)
Events.Description: Tank HP <= 80% and does not have tank invuln.

Events.Name: [14] Tetragrammaton (ST)
Events.Description: Any party member HP < 50%

Events.Name: [15] Benediction
Events.Description: Any target HP <= 35% AND target has no invuln buff.

Events.Name: [16] Divine Caress (Post-AoE)
Events.Description: After AoE/Raidwide AND Temperance active (applies regen)

Events.Name: [17] Liturgy of the Bell (Pop)
Events.Description: Manually pop if party average below <= 45% hp

Events.Name: [17.5] Afflatus Solace (Overcap) MT
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND main tank HP <= 80%.

Events.Name: [18] Afflatus Rapture (Overcap)
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND party HP <= 80%.

Events.Name: [19] Afflatus Rapture (Misery Ready)
Events.Description: Uses Afflatus Rapture for party healing even when Afflatus Misery is ready.

Events.Name: [19] Afflatus Rapture
Events.Description: Party HP <= 70%

Events.Name: [20] Afflatus Solace (ST Overcap)
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND a party member HP <= 60%.

Events.Name: [21] Afflatus Solace (MT, Misery Ready)
Events.Description: Uses Afflatus Solace on the main tank at 80% HP even when Afflatus Misery is ready.

Events.Name: [21] Afflatus Solace (MT)
Events.Description: Tank HP <= 80% and Tetragrammaton is on cooldown.

Events.Name: [22] Afflatus Solace (ST, Misery Ready)
Events.Description: Uses Afflatus Solace on low party members even when Afflatus Misery is ready.

Events.Name: [22] Afflatus Solace (ST)
Events.Description: Any party member HP < 50% AND Tetragrammaton on cooldown

Events.Name: [23] Regen (Downtime)
Events.Description: Tank if no target (during downtime)

Events.Name: [24] Regen
Events.Description: Tank <= 90% HP and missing Regen.

Events.Name: [25] Medica III
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND party HP < 70%

Events.Name: [26] Medica III (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND before AoE/Raidwide AND party HP < 80%

Events.Name: [27] Cure III
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND will hit 80% of party AND party HP < 40%

Events.Name: [28] Cure II
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND Tetragrammaton on CD AND Tank HP < 70% AND no mitigation

Events.Name: [29] Medica (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND before AoE/Raidwide AND party HP < 70%

Events.Name: [30] Medica
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND party hp <= 45%

Events.Name: [31] ST Regen
Events.Description: DPS-forward ST Regen fallback; low HP only.

Events.Name: [32] ST Cure II
Events.Description: Emergency-only ST Cure II fallback.

Events.Name: [33] Cure (MT Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for critical tank HP.

Events.Name: [34] Cure (ST Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for critical party HP.

Events.Name: [35] Medica (Low Level Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Medica fallback for critical party damage.

Events.Name: Esuna
Events.Description: Cleanses removable party debuffs when safe.

Events.Name: [36] Holy (3 Targets in Range)
Events.Description: Uses Holy only when at least three nearby enemies are inside Holy range.

Events.Name: Sprint OOC
Events.Description: Optional out-of-combat Sprint while moving.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal White Mage ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default White Mage toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default White Mage toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: [10B] Aquaveil (Pull Support)
Events.Description: Uses Aquaveil on the main tank during 3+ enemy pulls when HP is starting to fall.

Events.Name: [12B] Asylum (Tank Pull)
Events.Description: Drops Asylum for tank-only pressure during 3+ enemy pulls once the main tank reaches 80% HP.

Events.Name: Combat Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps White Mage damage, healing, raise, movement, and resource toggles in a sane public-duty state without touching ForceAOE.

Logics.Name: [31] Regen ST
Logics.Description: DPS-forward Regen: only refreshes on low party members, in combat, and not on invuln targets.

Logics.Name: [32] Cure II ST
Logics.Description: DPS-forward Cure II: emergency ST fallback only when lilies and Tetragrammaton are not available.

Logics.Name: [33] Cure (MT Emergency)
Logics.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for Conjurer/White Mage when the main tank is critical.

Logics.Name: [34] Cure (ST Emergency)
Logics.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for Conjurer/White Mage when a party member is critical.

Logics.Name: [35] Medica (Low Level Emergency)
Logics.Description: Low-level Medica fallback when party HP is critical and lilies are unavailable or not learned.

Logics.Name: Esuna
Logics.Description: Low-level cleanse fallback for duty finder and synced content.

Logics.Name: [36] Holy (3 Targets in Range)
Logics.Description: Direct Holy nudge for stacked 3+ enemy packs while stationary, avoiding Holy on spread-out pulls.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal White Mage ACR toggles while safely out of combat. Holy is managed by the guarded Jasper event instead of the generic ACR toggle.

Logics.Name: [10B] Aquaveil (Pull Support)
Logics.Description: Uses Aquaveil on the main tank during 3+ enemy pulls at 80 percent HP if Aquaveil is not already active.

Logics.Name: [12B] Asylum (Tank Pull)
Logics.Description: Drops Asylum for tank-only pressure during 3+ enemy pulls once the main tank reaches 80% HP.

Logics.Name: Combat Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps White Mage damage, healing, raise, movement, and resource toggles enabled in combat while leaving Holy controlled by the guarded in-range event.
